channel.title: OnThisDay
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnThisDay, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Today in History for 23rd April 2026
item.description: Historical Events 1516 - Duke Wilhelm IV of Bavaria endorses "The German Beer Purity Law" (Reinheitsgebot) and adds to it standards for the sale of be...
